product_overview: VaultRAG is a single-page corporate knowledge chat UI that lets users ask natural-language questions and get role-filtered retrieval-augmented answers in a conversational layout. The main surface includes a collapsible history sidebar, role controls (Employee vs Executive), welcome suggestions, and a fixed bottom input bar with optional file attach and voice controls.
core_goals: Ask natural-language questions against a secure, role-filtered knowledge base and receive conversational answers.
Keep and revisit past conversations via a history sidebar and start new sessions quickly.
Switch between Employee and Executive roles to expand retrieval scope and enable file attachments when appropriate.
Attach PDFs or CSVs (when in Executive role) and send them alongside messages for ingestion.
Toggle app theme and optionally use voice input and text-to-speech for convenience.

features.name: Conversational RAG search
features.description: Type questions in the bottom input or use welcome suggestions; the app submits queries to the backend and displays VaultRAG answers with optional source context and a typing indicator while waiting.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a question in the bottom input -> Submit the message with send action (Send button or Enter) -> See the user message appear in the thread labeled as the user's message -> See a typing indicator while the app waits -> See a system message from VaultRAG with an answer

Navigate to / -> Click a welcome suggestion pill to send that question immediately -> See the user message appear in the thread with the pill text -> See a typing indicator -> See a system message answer
Navigate to / -> Leave the input empty -> Observe the send action is disabled or submission does not occur

features.name: Conversation history sidebar
features.description: Open and close a collapsible history panel to view recent conversations, start new chats, switch active conversation, and delete entries.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the history sidebar using its toggle control -> Observe the sidebar shows controls including New chat and a Close sidebar control -> Close the sidebar using the close control -> Observe the sidebar is hidden
Navigate to / -> Send a message to create a conversation -> Open the history sidebar -> Click New chat to start a new conversation -> Observe the active conversation resets to the welcome/empty state
Navigate to / -> Send a message to create a conversation -> Open the history sidebar -> Select a recent conversation from the list -> Observe the active conversation switches to the selected thread
Navigate to / -> Send a message to create a conversation -> Open the history sidebar -> Delete the conversation from the list -> Observe the conversation is removed from the recent list

features.name: Employee and Executive role (RBAC demo)
features.description: View and change a role chip between Employee and Executive; Executive enlarges retrieval scope and enables file attachments in the input bar per UI copy.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the role chip displays the current role (Employee or Executive)
Navigate to / -> Observe the role chip shows Employee by default -> Click Unlock Executive and confirm the modal to switch to Executive -> Observe the role chip shows Executive
Navigate to / -> Switch to Executive role -> Click Use Employee role -> Observe the role chip shows Employee

features.name: Executive file upload
features.description: When in Executive mode, attach PDF or CSV files via the input bar and send them together with a message so attachments appear on the user bubble.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Executive role (unlock Executive if needed) -> Use the attach control to choose a PDF file -> Observe the chosen file listed on the pending message
Navigate to / -> Switch to Executive role -> Use the attach control to choose a CSV file -> Observe the chosen file listed on the pending message
Navigate to / -> Switch to Executive role -> Attach a file -> Submit the message -> Observe the user message posted with the attachment visible

features.name: Theme toggle
features.description: Switch the app between dark and light themes using the header control; aria-label and visual chrome update to reflect current theme.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle in the header -> Observe the aria-label updates and the UI updates to the opposite theme
Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle again -> Observe the aria-label and UI revert to the previous theme

features.name: Voice input and text-to-speech (browser-dependent)
features.description: If the browser supports it, use the microphone to transcribe speech into the input and toggle voice output so VaultRAG replies can be read aloud.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe whether the microphone control is present (presence indicates SpeechRecognition support)

Navigate to / -> If the microphone control is present: Activate the microphone control to start voice input -> Speak a question -> Observe the spoken text transcribed into the message input -> Submit the message -> Observe the conversation proceed as with typed input
Navigate to / -> Toggle the voice output (TTS) control to enable read-aloud -> Receive a system message from VaultRAG -> Observe the system reply is read aloud when TTS is enabled

routes.description: Main VaultRAG chat and search UI

features.name: Conversational RAG search
features.description: User asks questions; app posts to backend and shows VaultRAG answers with optional source chunks
user_interactions: Type a question in the bottom input and submit with send button or Enter
Click a welcome suggestion pill to send that question immediately
See user and system messages, typing indicator while waiting

features.name: Conversation history sidebar
features.description: List past chats, start new chat, switch conversation, delete entry
user_interactions: Open and close sidebar via toggle controls
Click New chat to clear active thread
Delete a conversation from the list

features.name: Employee and Executive role (RBAC demo)
features.description: Role chip and unlock flow; Executive enables PDF/CSV attach and broader retrieval scope per UI copy
user_interactions: View current role on header chip
Click Unlock Executive and confirm modal to switch to Executive
Click Use Employee role to return to Employee

features.name: Executive file upload
features.description: Attach PDF or CSV for ingestion when in Executive mode
user_interactions: In Executive mode, click paperclip and choose PDF or CSV files
Send message with attachments shown on user bubble

features.name: Theme toggle
features.description: Switch between dark and light theme

features.name: Voice input and TTS (browser-dependent)
features.description: Optional speech-to-text when supported; optional read-aloud for system replies

known_limitations.issue: Mic button only renders when browser exposes SpeechRecognition (often absent in headless CI)
known_limitations.impact: Voice input tests may be skipped in some environments

known_limitations.issue: Full RAG responses require backend at NEXT_PUBLIC_VAULTRAG_API_URL or default http://127.0.0.1:8000
known_limitations.impact: Without API, submit flows may show errors after loading state
